unit.comment: /* * Created by Phil on 29/11/2010. * Copyright 2010 Two Blue Cubes Ltd. All rights reserved. * * Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0. (See accompanying * file LICENSE_1_0.txt or copy at http://www.boost.org/LICENSE_1_0.txt) */

macro.name: SCENARIO
macro.argument_list: ( "This is a really long scenario name to see how the list command deals with wrapping", "[very long tags][lots][long][tags][verbose]" "[one very long tag name that should cause line wrapping writing out using the list command]" "[anotherReallyLongTagNameButThisOneHasNoObviousWrapPointsSoShouldSplitWithinAWordUsingADashCharacter]" )

macro.name: SCENARIO_METHOD
macro.argument_list: (Fixture, "BDD tests requiring Fixtures to provide commonly-accessed data or methods", "[bdd][fixtures]")
